name: bill-track
title: Track legislative bill — {{bill_id}}
description: Track a CA or federal bill through committees, votes, amendments, and final action.

steps.title: Baseline — pull current {{bill_id}} text, history, sponsors
steps.description:
Initial documentation:
- Pull bill text from leginfo.legislature.ca.gov or congress.gov
- Pull committee analyses (PDF)
- Pull registered support/opposition lists
- Pull voting history
- Save all to Drive: /Records/{{bill_id}}/baseline/

steps.title: Monitor committee progression — {{bill_id}}
steps.description:
Each committee vote: download new analysis, note amendments, note vote count.
Optionally set up schedule skill to re-check weekly.

steps.title: Publish public-facing analysis — {{bill_id}}
steps.description:
Produce a plain-English breakdown:
- What it does (per section)
- Who's for/against and why
- What the intent appears to be
- Where the gray zones are

Render via /magazine skill if sharable externally.

steps.title: Track final action — {{bill_id}}
steps.description: Governor signature, veto, or hold. Document outcome and implications.
